title: Integrations & Ecosystem
description: Connect Ray Data to cloud storage, data lakes, ML frameworks, and orchestrators

lessons.title: Cloud Storage: S3, GCS & Azure
lessons.description: Reading and writing data from AWS S3, Google Cloud Storage, and Azure Blob

lessons.title: Data Lakes: Delta Lake & Iceberg
lessons.description: Integration with Delta Lake, Apache Iceberg, and Hudi for lakehouse patterns

lessons.title: Databases & Warehouses
lessons.description: Connecting to PostgreSQL, MongoDB, BigQuery, Snowflake, and Redshift

lessons.title: ML Frameworks: PyTorch, TF & HuggingFace
lessons.description: Feeding Ray Data pipelines into training and inference with ML frameworks

lessons.title: Orchestration: Airflow, Prefect & Dagster
lessons.description: Scheduling and orchestrating Ray Data pipelines with workflow engines
